data.narrative:
Chai Discovery is a Series B biotech company founded by Joshua Meier (former Chief AI Officer at Absci and Meta/FAIR researcher) and Jack Dent (ex-Stripe), currently valued at $3.8B post-money on $130M raised. The valuation is anchored against a universe of 3 public comparables (RXRX, TEM, ONT.L) and 8 private peers in the Biotech & Health sector, including Colossal Biosciences ($10.3B Series C), New Limit ($3.1B Series C), and Eikon Therapeutics ($539M Series B).

Two valuation methods were applicable. Stage-progression analysis applied a 1.9x multiplier typical of Series B-to-next-stage advancement, implying $7.2B. Peer-median analysis across the 3 same-sector comparables yielded $3.1B (range $539M–$10.3B), reflecting wide dispersion within the biotech frontier-tech category. Public-comp anchoring via price-to-sales could not be applied absent disclosed revenue figures. 

Triangulation of these two methods supports a range of $2.6B (low) to $8.3B (high), with a median of $5.2B. The current $3.8B valuation sits near the peer median but below the stage-progression implied value, suggesting modest room for growth at the next funding event. Key uncertainties include revenue trajectory, clinical validation timelines, and whether the peer set adequately reflects Chai's specific technical and commercial positioning within the AI-driven biotech segment.
